meaning: n.部分,部门,[计]扇区,地区,象限,扇形v.使分成部分,把...分成扇形
examples: The retail sector has been a significant underperformer.
The news gave a fillip to the telecommunications sector.
The private sector, by contrast, has plenty of money to spend.
We eliminated sector funds from consideration because they tend to do well in spurts only.
Those structured products have fallen on hard times as the mortgage sector sinks deeper into crisis.
